summary: Backend Python developer with 5 years experience in building data pipelines and APIs. Strong in Python and SQL. Limited frontend experience. Have worked in financial services adjacent role (risk analytics). No cloud certifications.

positions.title: Backend Developer
positions.description: Built Python/Flask APIs for risk calculation models. Optimized SQL queries for large financial datasets. Managed Celery workers for async processing. No frontend work. On-premise deployments only.

positions.title: Python Developer
positions.description: Developed ETL pipelines in Python for financial data aggregation. Maintained PostgreSQL database. Limited React exposure — built one simple internal dashboard.

projects.title: Risk Dashboard
projects.description: Internal risk monitoring dashboard for portfolio VaR calculations. Python backend with basic HTML/CSS frontend.
